title: Search, Sharing & Polish
changes: Global search overlay across all content
Code copy buttons on blog code blocks
Share buttons (X, Telegram, copy link) on blog posts
Animated gradient borders on pillar cards

title: Terminal, PWA & Accessibility
changes: Interactive terminal easter egg on homepage
Blog reading progress bar and auto-generated TOC
PWA support with service worker for offline access
Smooth page transitions with fade effect
Agent graph: draggable nodes, zoom/pan, pulse animations
Accessibility: skip links, focus-visible, ARIA improvements

title: Content & Deployment
changes: Open Graph image for social sharing
3 new products: NullDNS, AgentForge, ZK Bridge
Deployed to Railway with custom domain

title: Initial Launch
changes: 6 pages: Home, Services, Products, Projects, Agents, Blog
Matrix rain, glitch text, typing effects
